title: News | Victoria Atkins

text_excerpt: News | Victoria Atkins Skip to main content Main navigation About Victoria News Campaigns In Parliament Contact News Victoria Atkins MP writes to Health Secretary about increased cost of fuel for Air Ambulance Friday, 24 April, 2026 Victoria has today written urgently to the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care regarding the increased costs for air ambulances, including Lincs and Notts Air Ambulance, following the ongoing situation in Iran. Victoria will provide an update once she receives a response and you can read the letter below.
